title: jasminum dolichopetalum
intro: Jasminum dolichopetalum, also known as the Fragrant Jasmine or Long-petaled Jasmine, is a flowering plant species in the Jasminum genus, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Jasminum dolichopetalum include reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
